{{Quote|I am Cheelru, of the Inner Circle. You should abase yourself.|Cheelru, to the heroes of Cularin|<ref name="APOD" />}}
The '''Inner Circle''' was a group of senior members of the [[Wyrd]], a [[Coven/Legends|coven]] of [[Tarasin]] [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Witch/Legends|witches]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. The Inner Circle were directly answerable to Wyrd's leader. Though the Inner Circle were once more numerous,<ref name="APOD" /> by about [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]<ref name="19 BBY">''[[Heart of Evil: A Plague of Darkness|A Plague of Darkness]]'' is set shortly before ''[[Heart of Evil: A Hero Seeks Not Vengeance|A Hero Seeks Not Vengeance]]'', a [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force]] adventure that occurs concurrently with the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]]. As the battle is dated to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', the events of ''A Plague of Darkness'' can be placed in circa 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].</ref> the Wyrd had suffered various setbacks and only six members of the Inner Circle remained. In a final gamble to achieve dominance on Cularin, the [[First Witch of the Wyrd]], the leader of the witches, committed the Wyrd to a plot to turn the [[ch'hala tree]]s of Cularin to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. The witch [[Cheelru]], a member of the Inner Circle, questioned the suitability of this plan and was [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] by the First Witch as a consequence. Shortly thereafter, the remaining five members of the Inner Circle accompanied the First Witch to the ch'hala [[Heart Tree]] and initiated a ritual to corrupt Cularin's ch'hala trees. However, the witches were [[First skirmish at the Heart Tree|defeated]] by the [[heroes of Cularin]] and their plan thwarted.<ref name="APOD" />
